should_fire.prompt: Write me a decision report for my manager from that crossover.
Generate a report for my manager about the deployment decision.
I need a stakeholder doc summarizing the build-vs-buy numbers.
Produce the decision doc for my team based on the estimate.
Run the decision-report skill on the computed crossover.

should_not_fire.prompt: No crossover computed yet — estimate the deployment economics first.
I am still in build work on the detector, tune the threshold.
Give me a one-paragraph summary of the options inline.
Answer inline with a quick one-paragraph summary of the options, no doc.
